2605.09195.title: The Geometry of Forgetting: Temporal Knowledge Drift as an Independent Axis in LLM Representations
2605.09195.paper_summary: Large language models confidently produce outdated answers, and no existing method can detect them. We show this is not an engineering failure but a structural one: temporal drift, whether a stored fact has changed since training, is encoded as a direction in the residual stream geometrically orthogonal to both correctness and uncertainty. Any method operating on correctness or uncertainty signals is therefore blind to drift by construction. We verify this across six instruction-tuned models. A linear probe trained directly on drift labels achieves AUROC $0.83$--$0.95$; methods based on token entropy, semantic entropy, CCS, and SAPLMA all remain near chance ($0.49$--$0.57$). Five tests confirm the geometric orthogonality: weight cosines ($|\cos| \leq 0.14$), score correlations ($|r| \leq 0.20$), bidirectional null-space projection ($|Δ| \leq 0.008$), iterative null-space projection with $k{=}10$, and difference-of-means dissociation. Mechanistically, the MLP retrieval circuit produces identical dynamics for stale recall and confabulation ($r > 0.81$, six models), explaining why output confidence cannot separate them. A cross-cutoff experiment holds inputs constant and varies only the model: the probe fires on the model whose training predates the fact's transition and stays silent otherwise ($P(A{>}B) = 0.975$--$0.998$, twelve model pairs), confirming it reads model-internal knowledge state rather than input properties. Our code and datasets will be publicly released.
2605.09195.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型自信地產生過時的答案，而現有的方法無法檢測到這一點。我們表明這不是工程上的失敗，而是結構上的問題：時間漂移，即自訓練以來儲存的事實是否已經改變，被編碼為在殘差流中與正確性和不確定性幾何正交的方向。因此，任何基於正確性或不確定性信號運作的方法在結構上對漂移是盲目的。我們在六個指令調整的模型中驗證了這一點。直接在漂移標籤上訓練的線性探針達到 AUROC $0.83$--$0.95$；基於標記熵、語義熵、CCS 和 SAPLMA 的方法則始終接近隨機機率 ($0.49$--$0.57$)。五項測試確認了幾何正交性：權重餘弦 ($|\cos| \leq 0.14$)、分數相關性 ($|r| \leq 0.20$)、雙向零空間投影 ($|Δ| \leq 0.008$)、帶有 $k{=}10$ 的迭代零空間投影，以及均值差異解離。在機制上，MLP 檢索電路對於陳舊回憶和虛構產生相同的動態 ($r > 0.81$，六個模型)，解釋了為什麼輸出信心無法將它們區分開來。一個交叉截止實驗保持輸入不變，僅變化模型：探針在訓練早於事實轉變的模型上觸發，而在其他情況下保持靜默 ($P(A{>}B) = 0.975$--$0.998$，十二對模型)，確認它讀取的是模型內部的知識狀態，而不是輸入屬性。我們的代碼和數據集將公開發布。
2605.09195.author: Rania Elbadry et.al.
2605.09195.authors: Rania Elbadry, Ahmed Heakl, Fan Zhang, Dani Bouch, Yuxia Wang, Preslav Nakov, Zhuohan Xie
